s2.ptxt: Using a precision straightedge and feeler gauge, measure the warpage on the contact surface of the cylinder head.

atten4.ptxt: The maximum allowable warpage of each installation surface is 0.3 mm (0.012 in.).

s2.ptxt: If the warpage is greater than the maximum, replace the manifold.
Using a precision straightedge and feeler gauge, measure the warpage on the contact surface of the cylinder head.

atten4.ptxt: The maximum allowable warpage of each installation surface is 0.3 mm (0.012 in.).

s2.ptxt: If the warpage is greater than the maximum, replace the manifold.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT INTAKE AIR SURGE TANK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a precision straightedge and feeler gauge, measure the warpage on the contact surface of the intake manifold.

specitem.ptxt: If the warpage is greater than the maximum, replace the surge tank.

s3.ptxt: Using a precision straightedge and feeler gauge, measure the surface contacting the cylinder head for warpage.

specitem.ptxt: If the warpage is greater than the maximum, replace the intake manifold.

s3.ptxt: Using a precision straightedge and feeler gauge, measure the surface contacting the surge tank for warpage.

specitem.ptxt: If the warpage is greater than the maximum, replace the intake manifold.
